idea-plugin.name: IntelliJ Navigator Frontend
idea-plugin.description:
Frontend companion for IntelliJ Navigator. Accepts scroll requests via TCP port 8766 to scroll the active editor to the caret position. Used with the backend Navigator plugin to support scroll-to-line in remote development (Gateway/WSL).

Usage:

    printf '{"action":"scroll"}\n' | nc -w 2 localhost 8766
